summary: Complete Student/Trainer System Testing - All features working correctly. Backend 100% (62/62 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all pages load, all CRUD operations verified)
passed_tests: Admin login at /admin with admin/headlock2024 - WORKS
Admin Users tab (Benutzer) - Shows trainers and students in separate tables
Admin Create user form - Has Name, E-Mail, Passwort, Rolle (dropdown), Telefon fields
Admin Users table shows edit/delete buttons per user with Aktiv status toggle
Login page at /login - visible and working with data-testid attributes
Student login (max@test.de/test1234) redirects to /student - WORKS
Student dashboard - Shows sidebar with Trainings, Profil, Nachrichten tabs
Student Profile - Can edit name, phone, bio, experience level, emergency contact
Student Trainings - Shows empty state (no upcoming sessions due to date filter)
Student Notifications - Shows training notifications with German text
Trainer login (leon@test.de/coach1234) redirects to /trainer - WORKS
Trainer dashboard - Shows existing session with attendance counts (zugesagt/abgesagt/offen)
Trainer Create session - Form has Trainingsvorlage, Datum, Coach selector, Notes DE/EN
Trainer Sessions list - Shows view and delete buttons per session
Backend POST /api/auth/login - OAuth2 form-data login works
Backend GET /api/auth/me - Returns user info with valid JWT token
Backend PUT /api/auth/profile - Updates user profile fields
Backend GET /api/admin/users - Returns all users (Basic Auth)
Backend POST /api/admin/users - Creates user with email validation
Backend PUT /api/admin/users/{id} - Updates user (name, phone, is_active)
Backend DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} - Deletes user and related data
Backend POST /api/sessions - Creates session with auto-attendance for all students
Backend PUT /api/attendance/{session_id} - Updates student RSVP status
Backend GET /api/notifications - Returns user notifications
Homepage at / loads correctly with hero section
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.js correctly uses OAuth2 form-data format for /api/auth/login
JWT token stored in localStorage with key 'hh_token'
StudentDashboard.jsx has proper role check - redirects trainer to /trainer
TrainerDashboard.jsx has proper role check - redirects student to /student
UsersManager.jsx correctly separates trainers and students in separate tables
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Email sending is MOCKED when RESEND_API_KEY not configured (logs only)
seed_data_creation: Test users already exist: max@test.de (student), leon@test.de (trainer). One training session for 2026-02-21 exists.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete student/trainer system is fully functional. Key flows: 1) Admin creates users at /admin Benutzer tab with Basic Auth. 2) Students/Trainers login at /login using OAuth2 form-data (username=email). 3) JWT stored in localStorage 'hh_token'. 4) Student dashboard at /student has profile, trainings (RSVP), notifications. 5) Trainer dashboard at /trainer has sessions management with attendance view. 6) All data-testid attributes present for testing.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending via Resend API is functional but requires RESEND_API_KEY in backend/.env. Without the key, emails are logged but not sent.
